LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.description: Create Whitespring megaturrets: Kontarion, Onager and Palintone, as well as their ammunition.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialDefenses.label: Difese di Whitespring
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.description: Craft powerful Whitespring mortar shells, such as shrapnel, armor piercing and cluster.
LanguageData.VFED_ImperialWarSolutions.label: Soluzioni di guerra di Whitespring
LanguageData.VFED_RemoteDemolition.label: Whitespring war solutions
LanguageData.VFEE_JanissaryGear.description: Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.description: Costruisci decorazioni presidenziali come tappeti Whitespring, specchi, poltroncine, lastre Whitespring, candelabri e altro ancora.
LanguageData.VFEE_NobleDecorations.label: arredamento presidenziale
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.description: Costruisci una sedia da scrivania presidenziale adatta agli alti funzionari di Whitespring e ai loro compiti cerimoniali.
LanguageData.VFEE_StellicThrone.label: sedia da scrivania presidenziale
